name: Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe Homemade Enchilada Sauce, see recipe
4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Enchilada Sauce according to recipe.
2. In a large, heavy skillet over high heat, saute the olive oil, chicken, worcestershire sauce and cumin. Cook just until the chicken loses its pink color; remove immediately from the skillet.
3. Heat peanut oil in a small skillet. Cook tortillas one at a time for about 5 seconds on each side, just until softened. Drain briefly, dip in enchilada sauce, and fill with 3 tablespoons of chicken filling, chopped scallions, and jalapenos. Roll up and place seam down in a shallow baking dish lightly coated with sauce.
4. When all the enchiladas are in the dish, pour a little sauce over them, add some grated cheese, and broil to melt the cheese.
5. Serve on a bed of lettuce and top each serving with sour cream and salsa verde.
